title: Aaye Din Bahar Ke
writer: Sachin Bhowmick, Harbans Dost, Sarshar Sailani
plot: Ravi is an eligible bachelor, who lives with his mother. The whereabouts of his dad are unknown. He meets with beautiful Kanchan and both fall in love. But they face major hurdles, as Ravi soon finds out that he is the child of an...
